mapper.select: SELECT id, disease_code, disease_name, disease_category, measure_unit, related_index, severity_enabled, enabled, sort_no, remark, created_at FROM disease_type_dict WHERE ORDER BY sort_no ASC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, disease_code, disease_name, disease_category, measure_unit, related_index, severity_enabled, enabled, sort_no, remark, created_at FROM disease_type_dict WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted = false
